title: Simple Wands
description: A simple wands mod that adds dragon's breath wands, fireball wands, and laser wands.
body:
This is a mod that adds 3 simple wands and their cores that can shoot the dragon fireball, small fireball (blaze fireball), and shoot a laser blast. If you want to add some basic magic wands to your world, this mod is for you!

These 3 wands can be craftable.
To craft these wands, you need to craft their cores first.

Dragon Core:

![A crafting recipe, with a dragon head, end crystal, and dragon's breath organized in a column, from top to bottom.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/588a3b25173110895635102f7e17ebaa6f4c9fe6.png)

Blaze Core:

![A crafting recipe, with a blaze powder, blaze rod, and fire charge organized in a column, from top to bottom.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34d0f5329056387fb0efc331ba26b85f6566a420.png)
